overview.description: Component to display formatted code snippets with syntax highlighting, copy-to-clipboard, and multiple code variant support.
overview.purpose: Component to display formatted code snippets with syntax highlighting, copy-to-clipboard, and multiple code variant support.
whenToUse: Use when you need to present code examples
or configuration snippets in a readable
overview.extraNotes: Supports multiple code variants (tab-bar or select), copy-to-clipboard, and theme adaptation (light/dark).

examples.minimal:
<mc-code-preview code="[{"label":"Vanilla","language":"javascript","template":"import '@maersk-global/community-ui-code-preview';
  
const codePreviewComponent = document.querySelector('mc-code-preview');
codePreviewComponent.code = [
  { label: 'Vanilla', template: "console.log('The Vanilla code!');", language: 'javascript' },
  { label: 'Angular', template: 'console.log("The Angular code")', language: 'javascript' },
];
<mc-code-preview></mc-code-preview>"},{"label":"Angular","language":"javascript","template":"import '@maersk-global/community-ui-code-preview';
  
<mc-code-preview [code]="the code array"></mc-code-preview>"}]"></mc-code-preview>
examples.basic:
<mc-code-preview fit="medium" code="[{"label":"Vanilla","language":"javascript","template":"import '@maersk-global/community-ui-code-preview';
  
const codePreviewComponent = document.querySelector('mc-code-preview');
codePreviewComponent.code = [
  { label: 'Vanilla', template: "console.log('The Vanilla code!');", language: 'javascript' },
  { label: 'Angular', template: 'console.log("The Angular code")', language: 'javascript' },
];
<mc-code-preview></mc-code-preview>"},{"label":"Angular","language":"javascript","template":"import '@maersk-global/community-ui-code-preview';
  
<mc-code-preview [code]="the code array"></mc-code-preview>"}]" appearance="default" variant="tab-bar"></mc-code-preview>

props.name: heading
props.description: Heading to be displayed above the code preview. Can be passed as simple text or as a named slot `heading`.

props.name: footer
props.description: Footer to be displayed below the code preview. Can be passed as simple text or as a named slot `footer`.

props.name: code

defaultValue.label: Vanilla
React
defaultValue.template:
import { McCodePreview } from "@maersk-global/community-ui-react-wrapper";
  
<McCodePreview code={the code array}></McCodePreview>

props.description: An array of objects that contain the code to be displayed in the code preview. Each object should have a tab, copy, language, and template property.

props.name: hidetoggle
props.description: If the attribute is set, then the toggle button will be hidden.

slots.description: Use the heading named slot, when you want to pass heading as HTML. Check stories under Examples folder to see live example.
slots.name: heading

slots.description: Use the footer named slot, when you want to pass footer as HTML. Check stories under Examples folder to see live example.
slots.name: footer

members.name: label
members.description: If the tab is not supplied the code will be displayed without tabs.

cssParts.description: Using this CSS part you can change the look of the code display panel. Check Examples -> Customised appearance story to see live example.
cssParts.name: code-panel

cssParts.description: Using this CSS part you can change the look of the header. Check Examples -> Customised appearance story to see live example.
cssParts.name: header-panel

cssParts.description: Using this CSS part you can change the look of the footer. Check Examples -> Customised appearance story to see live example.
cssParts.name: footer-panel
